 AlgoSec is an Equal Opportunity Employer (EEO), committed to creating a friendly, diverse and inclusive company culture.

description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏
 
 2\\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
 


* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders


 ͏
 
 3\\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
 


* Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
* Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
* Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
* Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
* Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
* Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
* Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
* Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally


 ͏

**No.**

 1\\.Continuous Integration, Deployment \\& Monitoring of Software100% error free on boarding \\& implementation, throughput %, Adherence to the schedule/ release plan2\\.Quality \\& CSATOn\\-Time Delivery, Manage software, Troubleshoot queries, Customer experience, completion of assigned certifications for skill upgradation3\\.MIS \\& Reporting100% on time MIS \\& report generation
 
  
 







 Mandatory Skills: Core Java .
 



  
 



 Experience: 1\\-3 Years
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \\- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

title: QA Engineer
description:
**QA Engineer (2\\-4 Years Experience)** 




  





**We're looking for a QA Engineer who breaks things before your users do.** 




 MyYogaTeacher powers 200K\\+ customers and thousands of live 1\\-on\\-1 yoga sessions daily across the globe. Real\\-time video, intelligent matching, global scheduling, multi\\-currency payments — all running at a quality bar your testing instincts would own and raise.
 



 We're building an AI\\-first engineering culture. Not as a buzzword — as the way we actually work. You'll be the person who redefines what QA looks like when AI tools are in the loop: faster test generation, smarter coverage, and a quality bar that scales with the product.
 



 If AI\\-assisted testing, automation\\-first thinking, and a deep hatred of regressions are already part of your daily workflow — keep reading.
 



  





**What You'll Own** 



* End\\-to\\-end test coverage across web and mobile — functional, regression, edge cases, and beyond.
* Automation frameworks built on Playwright, designed for reliability and maintainability at scale.
* API testing pipelines that catch contract breaks before they hit production.
* The AI\\-assisted QA playbook for the team: how we use tools like GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and others to generate, review, and improve test coverage faster.
* Bug triage and root cause collaboration with developers — you don't just file tickets, you help fix problems.
* Quality visibility across sprint cycles: clear documentation, structured reports, and honest status.



  





**What You Bring** 




**The fundamentals:** 



* 2–4 years in QA / software testing with a strong foundation in manual testing principles.
* Hands\\-on API testing experience (Postman or equivalent).
* Working knowledge of JavaScript and practical experience with Playwright or similar automation frameworks.
* Solid SQL skills for data validation and backend verification.
* Comfort with Agile/Scrum workflows and bug tracking tools like Jira.



  





**What makes you a standout hire:** 



* You use AI tools — ChatGPT, Copilot, or similar — not occasionally, but as a core part of how you generate test cases, debug failures, and improve coverage.
* You think in edge cases. You find the flows no one wrote a spec for.
* You have opinions about test architecture — what's worth automating, what's a waste, and how to keep a test suite from becoming a maintenance nightmare.
* You catch issues that developers miss and communicate them without friction.
* You don't wait to be told what to test — you read requirements and ask the uncomfortable questions early.



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience testing real\\-time or video\\-based applications.
* Familiarity with performance or load testing tools.
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and integrating test automation into release workflows.
* Public writing, talks, or open\\-source contributions related to QA or test automation.



  





**What It's Like Here** 



* Small, high\\-output team. Low bureaucracy, high autonomy.
* Ship weekly. Your coverage keeps that pace honest.
* AI tooling isn't a side project — it's how we build.
* 200K\\+ customers, 335K\\+ five\\-star reviews, 95% sessions rated 5 stars.
* Competitive compensation \\+ meaningful equity.
* Headquartered in California, engineering in Bangalore.



  





**Interested?** 
 Apply directly or DM me. Bonus points if you share how AI tools have changed the way you approach testing — we care more about how you think than where you've worked.
 



 Learn more: myyogateacher.com/aboutus

 JOB DESCRIPTION:
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Lead** 
 with strong expertise across backend engineering, frontend development, cloud\\-native architectures, DevOps, and emerging AI technologies. This role combines deep technical expertise with the ability to mentor teams, design scalable systems, and ensure high‑quality implementation.

title: AI Agentic Lead
description:
**Job Title: Lead AI Engineer (Agentic Systems)** 




**Location: Hyderabad \\- Hybrid** 




**Employment Type: Full\\-time** 




**Shift: 1 PM \\- 10 PM IST** 




  





**About the Role** 




 We are moving beyond simple chatbots. We are building autonomous AI systems that can reason, plan, and execute complex tasks. We are looking for a founding\\-level Lead Engineer to architect and build the core "Agentic" layer of our platform. You will not just be calling APIs; you will be designing the logic that allows AI to interact with the world.
 



**The Role** 



* Architect and implement autonomous AI agents using Python.
* Design complex orchestration workflows (ReAct, Plan\\-and\\-Execute) to handle multi\\-step tasks.
* Integrate agents with external tools, APIs, and internal data sources.
* Optimize prompt strategies and manage context windows for cost and latency.
* Lead the technical roadmap for our AI agent infrastructure and mentor junior engineers.
* Stay ahead of the curve on emerging agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen).



**Qualifications** 



* **7\\+ years of software engineering experience** 
 with a heavy focus on Python.
* **Experience building Agentic / Autonomous systems.** 
 (We want to see projects where the AI had to make decisions and call tools).
* Deep understanding of LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and concepts like streaming, function calling, and embeddings.
* Proficiency with orchestration frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, or LlamaIndex.
* Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus) is a plus.
* Strong computer science fundamentals (data structures, algorithms, concurrency).

title: Lead InterSystems IRIS Developer
description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION** 




  





**Job Title: Senior Software Developer (Interoperability)** 




  





 Job Description:
 



 We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Developer with a focus on interoperability solutions. In this role, you will design, develop, and implement software systems using Intersystem product that facilitate seamless communication and data exchange between disparate systems. You will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to ensure the successful integration of technologies, improving efficiency and user experience for our EHR systems, you will also play a critical role in enhancing our software capabilities and ensuring high\\-quality integration standards.
 



**Required Qualifications** 




 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 



 5\\+ years of software development experience, with a focus on interoperability solutions
 



 Familiarity with integration platforms and middleware solutions, Proficiency in Intersystem products (e.g., HealthShare, Ensemble, IRIS) and experience in implementing interoperability solutions is preferred
 



 Experience with RESTful APIs, SOAP, and JSON/XML data formats.
 



 Good knowledge of healthcare data standards (HL7, FHIR, DICOM, etc.)
 



 Key Responsibilities:
 



 Design and Development a robust, scalable, and efficient software solutions utilizing Intersystem technologies, such as HealthShare, Ensemble, or IRIS.
 



 Develop and implement interoperability frameworks that support data exchange and communication between disparate healthcare systems and applications.
 



 Work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including product management, and quality assurance, to understand requirements and deliver effective solutions.
 



 Design integration architectures using HL7, FHIR, or other relevant standards to ensure compliance and best practices in data exchange.
 



 Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and share constructive feedback with team members
 



 Provide expert\\-level support for deployed applications, troubleshoot issues, and implement enhancements as needed.
 



 Maintain comprehensive documentation of integration processes, system configurations, and project specifications
 



 Conduct rigorous testing of interoperability solutions to ensure reliability, security, and performance
 



 Keep abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends related to interoperability and software development
